description_long: This is a compact MIDI controller keyboard, specifically the AKAI MPK Mini, designed for music production and live performance. The device features 25 velocity-sensitive keys in a two-octave layout, eight backlit drum pads, and eight rotary control knobs for real-time parameter adjustments. The top panel is adorned with various labeled controls, including pitch and modulation buttons, and a prominent red joystick for expressive control. The chassis is primarily black with red accents along the sides, and the branding is clearly visible on the front edge. The surface is a mix of matte and slightly glossy plastic, with the keys and pads standing out in white and black. This keyboard is lightweight and portable, making it suitable for use in urban environments such as street performances, studios, or creative workspaces.
description: A compact black and red AKAI MPK Mini MIDI controller keyboard with 25 keys, eight drum pads, and eight rotary knobs, designed for music production and performance.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full 25-key layout, drum pads, rotary knobs, and the AKAI branding.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the red side panel and the depth of the keyboard, with keys and controls visible from an angle.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the AKAI MPK mini logo, rotary knobs, and the back edge of the keys.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the red side panel and the profile of the keys and controls.
